author: victor
description: Scrivener-style corkboard view for Obsidian folders. Each folder gets an index.corkboard with cards for its markdown files. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: victor
manifest.description: Scrivener-style corkboard view for folders. Each folder gets an index.corkboard with cards for its markdown files.
manifest.name: Corkboard

name: Corkboard

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## English

Compliance release. Addresses Obsidian community review feedback for v1.0.0.

### Fixes

- Raise `minAppVersion` from 1.4.0 to 1.6.6 — the previous declaration
  was incorrect because the plugin uses `FileManager.trashFile`, which
  only exists from Obsidian 1.6.6 onward.
- Popout window compatibility: all DOM access and timer scheduling now
  goes through `activeDocument` / `window.setTimeout` so the corkboard
  view works correctly when popped out into a separate native window.

No user-facing feature changes; full v1.0.0 feature list still applies.

### Requirements

Obsidian **1.6.6** or newer. Desktop only.

---

## 繁體中文

合規修正版本。處理 Obsidian community 對 v1.0.0 的審查回饋。

### 修正

- 把 `minAppVersion` 從 1.4.0 改為 1.6.6——之前宣告錯誤，本 plugin
  使用的 `FileManager.trashFile` API 從 Obsidian 1.6.6 才存在。
- Popout 視窗相容性：所有 DOM 存取與計時器都改透過 `activeDocument` /
  `window.setTimeout`，corkboard 拉成獨立 popout 視窗後也能正常運作。

沒有面向使用者的功能變更；v1.0.0 完整功能列表照舊。

### 系統需求

Obsidian **1.6.6** 或更新版本，僅支援桌面版。

releases.author: Nighteye841228
releases.description:
## English

Scrivener-style **corkboard** for Obsidian. Each folder gets an
`index.corkboard` file that renders the folder's markdown notes as
index cards arranged in a flowing grid.

### Features at a glance

- One card per `.md` file (title / synopsis / status / colour).
- Drag-and-drop reorder, multi-select, inline synopsis edit, rename by
  double-clicking the title.
- File-system auto-sync — create / rename / delete / move md files
  outside the corkboard and the cards follow.
- Right-click a folder in the file explorer to create its corkboard.
- Theme-aware card colours.

Full feature list, screenshots, and usage details are in the [README](https://github.com/Nighteye841228/obsidian-corkboard/blob/master/README.md)
(or [README_zh_TW](https://github.com/Nighteye841228/obsidian-corkboard/blob/master/README_zh_TW.md)).

### Install

Manual install — see the README for step-by-step instructions.
Short version: drop `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` from this
release into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/corkboard/`, then enable in
Settings → Community plugins.

### Requirements

Obsidian **1.4.0** or newer. Desktop only.

### Known limits in v1.0.0

- *Rebind to another file…* in the card menu is a stub.
- No undo/redo within the corkboard view.
- Sub-folders are not displayed; the corkboard only lists md files in
  the same folder as `index.corkboard`.

---

## 繁體中文

仿 Scrivener 軟木板的 Obsidian plugin。每個資料夾會有一個
`index.corkboard` 檔，把資料夾裡的 markdown 筆記以紙條形式排列。

### 主要功能

- 一張紙條對應一個 `.md` 檔（標題 / synopsis / status / 顏色）。
- 拖曳重新排序、多選、inline 編輯 synopsis、雙擊標題改檔名。
- 檔案系統自動同步 — 在 corkboard 外新增 / 改名 / 刪除 / 搬移 md，紙
  條自動跟上。
- 在檔案總管的資料夾上按右鍵就能建立該資料夾的 corkboard。
- 隨主題變化的卡片顏色。

完整功能說明、操作步驟、截圖請看 [README_zh_TW](https://github.com/Nighteye841228/obsidian-corkboard/blob/master/README_zh_TW.md)（或英文版 [README](https://github.com/Nighteye841228/obsidian-corkboard/blob/master/README.md)）。

### 安裝

手動安裝 — 詳細步驟請看 README。簡述：把這份 release 的 `main.js`、
`manifest.json`、`styles.css` 三個檔放到
`<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/corkboard/`，再到 Settings → Community
plugins 啟用即可。

### 系統需求

Obsidian **1.4.0** 或更新版本，僅支援桌面版。

### v1.0.0 已知限制

- 紙條選單的 *Rebind to another file…* 還是 stub。
- 視圖內沒有 undo/redo。
- 不顯示子資料夾；corkboard 只看跟 `index.corkboard` 同一層的 md。

* File-system auto-sync — create / rename / delete / move md files outside the corkboard and the cards follow.
* Right-click a folder in the file explorer to create its corkboard.
* Theme-aware card colours.

Full feature list, screenshots, and usage details are in the [[README](https://github.com/Nighteye841228/obsidian-corkboard/blob/master/README.md)](https://github.com/Nighteye841228/obsidian-corkboard/blob/master/README.md) (or [[README_zh_TW](https://github.com/Nighteye841228/obsidian-corkboard/blob/master/README_zh_TW.md)](https://github.com/Nighteye841228/obsidian-corkboard/blob/master/README_zh_TW.md)).
